languages.text: "Янур рассказал мне, что у тебя есть какая-то защита от визга Погонщицы".
"Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."
languages.original_text: "Янур рассказал мне, что у тебя есть какая-то защита от визга Погонщицы".

traits.locale_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."
"Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."
"Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."
"Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

languages.text: 「ジャヌールから聞いた。君はドローヴァーの叫びに対抗する何らかの防御手段を持っているそうだ」
languages.original_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

traits.locale_text: ジャヌールから聞いた。君はドローヴァーの叫びに対抗する何らかの防御手段を持っているそうだ。

languages.text: « Janur m'a dit que vous aviez un moyen de vous protéger contre le cri du Chasseur. »
languages.original_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

traits.locale_text: « Janur m'a dit que vous aviez un moyen de vous protéger contre le cri du Chasseur. »

languages.text: "Janur bana Çoban'ın çığlığına karşı bir tür savunmaya sahip olduğunuzu söyledi."
languages.original_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

traits.locale_text: "Janur bana Çoban'ın çığlığına karşı bir tür savunmaya sahip olduğunuzu söyledi."

languages.text: "Janur erzählte mir, Ihr hättet irgendeine Verteidigung gegen den Schrei eines Treibers."
languages.original_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

traits.locale_text: "Janur erzählte mir, Ihr hättet irgendeine Verteidigung gegen den Schrei eines Treibers."

languages.text: «Janur me dijo que poseían algún tipo de defensa contra el grito del Pastor».
languages.original_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

traits.locale_text: «Janur me dijo que poseían algún tipo de defensa contra el grito del Pastor».

languages.text: “雅努尔告诉我，你们拥有某种能抵御‘拒生花’尖啸的东西。”
languages.original_text: "Janur told me that you possess some sort of defence against the Drover's cry."

traits.locale_text: “雅努尔告诉我，你们拥有某种能抵御‘拒生花’尖啸的东西。”
